sandbox.showInFinderTitle: Open this project's folder in your file manager
sandbox.explainTooltip: Walk through the editor's code step by step
sandbox.generateTooltip: Describe what you want and have the assistant write it

library.title: Library
library.subtitle: {count} course on this machine
library.exportAllTitle: Export every course in the library as .academy archives to a folder of your choice
library.importBookTitle: Run the AI pipeline on a PDF or EPUB to generate a course
library.booksBlurb: Long-form courses with chapters and exercises.
library.tracksBlurb: Exercism-style language curriculums — concept lessons in order plus practice exercises.
library.challengesBlurb: Per-language exercise packs — short coding problems sorted easy → hard.
library.installTitle: Add this book to your library
library.dropTitle: Drop to add to your library

addCourse.primaryTitle: Pick a PDF, EPUB, .academy archive, or course.json — we'll figure out which pipeline to run
addCourse.pickFileHint: PDF, EPUB, .academy, course.json — we sniff and route
addCourse.bulkPdfsHint: Queue many books for unattended batch import
addCourse.docsUrlHint: Crawl a documentation site and generate a course
addCourse.archiveHint: .academy / .libre / .kata exports (also handled by the smart picker)
addCourse.browseCatalogHint: Search and install books from the Libre library

tracks.title: Tracks
tracks.blurbHyper: Language tracks and challenge packs side by side. Scroll the catalogue and pick a language — Exercism-style curriculums drop you into a structured concept-by-concept path; challenge packs drop you straight into the next unsolved problem.
tracks.blurbGrid: Language tracks and challenge packs side by side. Pick a language — Exercism-style curriculums drop you into a structured concept-by-concept path; challenge packs drop you straight into the next unsolved problem.

commandPalette.noMatchesHint: Try a course, lesson title, or "open settings".
commandPalette.verifyAllHint: Run every exercise across the library
commandPalette.applyFixesHint: Paste an LLM reply to patch lessons

lesson.revealSolutionHint: Overwrite your code with the reference
lesson.exerciseDemotedBody: The generator couldn't build a working exercise for this lesson on the first run — it failed validation 3 times and demoted the lesson to a reading. Hit retry to run just this one lesson again with the latest prompt.
lesson.popBackTitle: Close the popped window and dock the workbench back into this pane

editor.popOut: Open editor + console in a separate window

editorHints.label: Hint {current} of {total}
editorHints.tooltipNext: Reveal a progressively more specific hint
editorHints.tooltipNoneWithMenu: No hints for this lesson — use the menu for reset / solution
editorHints.tooltipNoneNoMenu: No hints, reset, or solution for this lesson
editorHints.confirmBody: This will replace your current code with the hidden reference solution. Your in-progress work will be lost.

output.outputPlaceholder: run your code to see output here

settings.title: Settings
settings.languageDescription: Translates the app interface AND the content of Libre-authored courses. Third-party books stay in their original language.
settings.changesApplyImmediately: Changes on this tab apply immediately.
settings.startFreshBody: Wipes every course, completion, achievement, streak, and cached progress on this device. Theme, language, and other preferences stay. (Cross-device sync needs a sign-in — without one this only resets the local copy.)
settings.startFreshArmedBody: Tap Confirm within 5 s to wipe every course, completion, achievement, streak, and cached progress on this device. The page will reload with a freshly-seeded library.
settings.signedOutBlurb: Sign in to sync progress, streaks, and lesson history between devices, upload your imported books, and share courses with friends. Libre works fully offline without an account — signing in is purely additive.
settings.generalDescription: About this build, and where to grab the next one.
settings.autoAdvanceSub: When you pass the tests on a code exercise, jump straight to the next lesson.
settings.updatesDesktopOnly: Updates are only checked from the desktop build.
settings.updateAvailableSub: Download + install from inside the app — no reinstall needed.
settings.updateRestartHint: Restart the app to switch to the new version.
settings.soundsDescription: Sound effects fire on lesson completions, achievement unlocks, streak milestones, and section/book wraps. Every cue is synthesised at runtime — no bundled audio, latency-free, scales smoothly with the volume slider below.
settings.soundEffectsSub: Single switch for every cue. Test buttons still play when this is off.
settings.volumeSub: {percent}% — applies to every cue at the audio-graph master gain.
settings.bronzeUnlockSub: Plays when you earn a bronze-tier achievement.
settings.silverUnlockSub: Plays when you earn a silver-tier achievement.
settings.goldUnlockSub: Plays when you earn a gold-tier achievement.
settings.platinumUnlockSub: Plays when you earn a platinum-tier achievement.
settings.xpEarnedSub: A small pop the moment a lesson flips complete.
settings.levelUpSub: Plays when your XP crosses a level threshold.
settings.sectionCompleteSub: Plays when every lesson in a chapter is done.
settings.bookCompleteSub: Plays when every chapter in a book is done.
settings.dayFlipSub: Quick tick when the streak counter increments.
settings.streakFreezeUsedSub: Plays when a freeze shield saves your streak.
settings.uiTapSub: Soft tick for generic button + tap feedback.
settings.accountDescription: Your Libre cloud account. Lesson progress syncs across devices when signed in; nothing is uploaded otherwise.
settings.signOutSub: Removes the cloud token from this device. Your local courses and progress stay; sign back in any time.
settings.startFreshCloudArmedBody: Tap Confirm within 5 s to wipe every course, completion, achievement, streak, and cached progress on this device, plus the matching cloud rows.
settings.startFreshCloudBody: Wipes every course, completion, achievement, streak, and cached progress on this device, plus the matching cloud rows. Sign-in, theme, and preferences stay.
settings.deleteAccountSub: Permanently deletes your Libre cloud account, all synced progress, and any uploaded courses. Local files on this device are not affected. Cannot be undone.
settings.aiIngestBlurb: Paste an Anthropic API key to enable Claude-powered structuring when you import a book. Without a key, the import falls back to the deterministic splitter (chapter/section breaks only).
settings.copyAnthropic: Copy Anthropic API key to clipboard
settings.copyOpenai: Copy OpenAI API key to clipboard
settings.sonnetHint: Default. ~$3 in / $15 out per 1M tokens. Great for most books.
settings.opusHint: ~$15 in / $75 out per 1M tokens. ~5× cost, best pedagogy + test design.
settings.haikuHint: ~$1 in / $5 out per 1M tokens. Quick + cheap but weaker structured output.
settings.shortcutsDescription: Click a binding chip to rebind. Standalone keys (Esc, Tab, Arrows) work without a modifier; typeable keys need at least one of ⌘, Ctrl, Shift, or ⌥.
settings.resetAllDisabledHint: All bindings are at their defaults
settings.bindingAria: {action}: currently bound to {combo}. Click to rebind.
settings.bindingAlreadyDefault: This binding is already at its default
settings.appearanceDescription: Pick a language for both the app interface and the lesson content, then a theme for the surrounding chrome. Both choices persist locally and sync to your other devices when you're signed in.
settings.sidebarClassicBlurb: Familiar chapter accordion with titled lessons and per-chapter progress rings. Best for narrative books with descriptive lesson names.
settings.sidebarGridBlurb: Numbered cell grid per chapter — a 30-lesson chapter fits in five rows. Hover any cell to peek at its lesson title. Best for challenge packs and books with short, sequential lessons.
settings.dataDescription: Pull in new bundled books, inspect cloud-sync state, and check your installed toolchains. Destructive resets live under Settings → Account (Start fresh).
settings.syncLatestCoursesBody: Pulls newly-bundled books into your library and refreshes any existing courses with the latest lessons + drills. Deleted packs stay deleted.
settings.syncDiagsUnavailable: Sync diagnostics aren't available in this build.
settings.developerDescription: A floating panel captures every console.log, thrown error, and unhandled promise rejection from the moment the app loads. Useful for debugging boot stalls, slow navigations, and crashes on devices where DevTools isn't reachable.
settings.devConsoleOn: Console panel is visible. Drag the header to move, bottom-right corner to resize, × to close + disable.
settings.devConsoleOff: Hidden. Logs are still being captured in memory — toggle on to see them.
settings.shortcutNeedsModifier: {combo} needs a modifier (⌘, Ctrl, Shift, or ⌥) — try again.
settings.diagnosticsDescription: Read-only probes for bundled assets and user data. If something on the app is missing or broken, the cause usually shows up here as a red row with a remedy hint. Send a screenshot of this pane when filing a bug.
settings.noInstallRecipe: No install recipe shipped for {language}. Try the remedy hint above.

auth.firstLaunchHeadline: Save your progress with a Libre account
auth.firstLaunchBlurb: Optional. Sign in to sync streaks and lesson progress between devices, upload your imported books, and share courses with friends. Skip to keep using Libre entirely on this machine — everything still runs locally.

setup.title: Set up local AI
setup.blurb: For the in-app AI tutor to run on your machine, we'll need Homebrew and Ollama. Both are optional — Libre still works without them, and you can plug in a cloud API key from Settings → AI instead.
setup.brewDescription: Package manager we use to install Ollama. Opens brew.sh in your browser — paste the one-liner into Terminal, then come back and click "Re-check".
setup.brewDescriptionDone: Homebrew is installed and on your PATH.
setup.ollamaDescription: Runs small AI models locally so your chats and code suggestions stay on your machine. Runs `brew install ollama` (~30-60s), then starts the daemon.
setup.ollamaDescriptionDone: Ollama is installed. You can pick a model from Settings → AI.
setup.ollamaDescriptionNeedsBrew: Install Homebrew first — this button stays disabled until it's on your PATH.

certificates.title: Certificates
certificates.pageSubtitle: A keepsake for every course you finish — plus a preview of the ones you're working toward. Hover any earned ticket to make the hologram catch the light; click to download the PNG.
certificates.emptyBody: Start a course from the Library — once you've completed your first lesson, an in-progress ticket lands here showing how far you've come. Finish every lesson and the ticket promotes itself to an earned certificate with a holographic foil and a QR code anyone can scan to verify it.
certificates.ariaInProgressFor: Certificate in progress for {title}: {done} of {total} lessons complete
certificates.tagline: Self-paced courses on the craft of programming

practice.title: Practice
practice.noQuestions: No practice questions queued. Finish some lessons first.
practice.emptyTitleSeed: Open a lesson to start the deck.
practice.emptyBlurb: Every quiz question and code-blocks puzzle you encounter in a lesson becomes a card here. Finish one — even just one — and the deck starts filling. The scheduler handles the rest: short sessions, spaced apart, biased toward whatever you got wrong recently.

ai.notReady: Local assistant isn't ready — see above.

stats.readyLevelUp: Ready to level up — complete any lesson!
stats.completeToStart: complete a lesson today to start
stats.coinsHint: bank for upgrades, cosmetics, and freezes (coming soon)
stats.hintCanFreeze: You missed yesterday — freeze it to keep your streak.
stats.hintYesterdayFrozen: Yesterday is frozen. Run is safe.
stats.hintNoShields: No shields left this week. They refill Monday.
stats.hintTodayActive: Streak active. Shields refill every Monday.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptyBlurb: Achievement unlocks and other notifications will land here.

banners.installBody: Run Rust, Swift, C, C++, Java, Kotlin, C#, SvelteKit, and offline AI. Free + open source.
banners.keepReading: You can keep reading the lesson — only the Run button is gated on web.
banners.updateReadySub: Click Install to download in the background.
banners.updateInstalledSub: Your tabs and progress will be reopened automatically.
banners.toolchainPasswordRequired: Password is required for this install.
banners.toolchainPasswordHint: Stays on your machine — piped directly into sudo and never logged or persisted.
banners.toolchainInstallFailed:
Install exited with a non-zero status.

sidebar.emptyBody: Pick something from the library to get going. Courses you start will show up here.
